headline: Why Atomera (ATOM) Is Up 60.7% After Expanding Synopsys GaN Modeling Collaboration
summary: In April 2026, Synopsys announced an expanded collaboration with Atomera to enhance gallium nitride device modeling for radio frequency and power semiconductor applications, building on their long-standing work integrating Atomera’s MST technology into the Sentaurus TCAD environment. This extension into GaN workflows, supported by Atomera’s MSTcad toolset, could make it easier for chipmakers to assess MST’s impact in high-value RF and power markets. We’ll now examine how this expanded...
